title: spirillus pusillus
intro: Spirillus pusillus, also known as Silybum marianum, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is commonly referred to as milk thistle and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the liver and gallbladder. The plant contains silymarin, a flavonoid complex that has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it beneficial for health issues such as liver damage, jaundice, and hepatitis. In herbal preparations, milk thistle is often used as a supplement in capsule or tea form, and is also used in combination with other herbs to support overall liver health and detoxification.
